indicators.name: couches
indicators.rationale: Couches are not designed for sleep and do not provide a suitable surface for lying down.

indicators.name: dining tables
indicators.rationale: Dining tables are not designed for sleep and do not provide a suitable surface for lying down.

indicators.name: hard flooring
indicators.rationale: Hard flooring is not comfortable for lying down and can be noisy.

indicators.name: no windows
indicators.rationale: No windows prevent natural light and views, which are important for circadian rhythm regulation.

indicators.name: no curtains
indicators.rationale: No curtains prevent light control and privacy, which are important for sleep quality.

reasoning_summary: The scene is not well-suited for sleep (primary). There are no windows, curtains, or soft surfaces to provide comfort and light control. The hard flooring and lack of windows make it unsuitable for sleep.
